target: 9. Shadow Sickness
Hah, hah…

(As Totsumura-san said.
The Koba Mart's shutter is closed…)
…Mio.
Shin-chan…

…Even yesterday, you came to the funeral.
At the Kobayakawa's…
…Yeah…

Sorry.
The store…I ran out…
It's fine.

Shiori-chan…
She's been acting strange lately.

Ah, she's been like that since the shock
couldn't speak…
No, it's not that.
Huh?

It started before that…
Last week maybe…she said something weird…

At Mt. Takanosu,
while catching insects she saw…

…Saw?
What?
A girl who looked just like me.
…From the next day on…

At school, on the way to school…
I've felt like I've been watched…

That…what?
Like a Doppelgänger…?

(Another version of myself---
I think I read somewhere that people who see a Doppelgänger die…)

(Suddenly being asked such a thing
I don't know how to react…)
Hey, you, there's a shadow…
…Huh?

…Hey, Mio.
Who is that guy…?

It's Nezu-san.
The hunter…

What that girl saw was
a disease called Shadow Sickness…
…Shadow…?
It's like a local disease passed down on this island.

These days, there are fewer people who see it…
But before the war, it was common.

If you get the Shadow Sickness,
you start seeing shadows…

Those who see shadows die.
They're killed by the shadow.

Then, pretending to be the victim,
they kill everyone in the family.
That's the legend…

So, the sick people go to Hiruko Shrine for exorcism.
My grandfather used to say…
(He left…)

What…?
That conversation just now…

Hey Shin-chan.
I also…when I was little,
my grandma told me about it…
The shadow story?

Yeah…
Shin-chan, you don't know?

No…but it's probably just
superstition, right?

Yeah…but…
I saw my sister's shadow.

Three days before my sister died.
We went to the Omoto Beach garbage collection event together.
At that time---
Look, Mio!
Huh?

…What the hell!! 
There's a difference between a joke and a bad joke!!
Seeing a shadow of Ushio!!

It's true!! 
But it disappeared right in front of my eyes…
My…my sister died three days later…!!
Ugh…I'm worried about Shiori and the others…!!

(Calm down, calm down, calm down…
Don't panic…It's Shadow Sickness!?
That's a ridiculous story, right!)

(But…the Kobayakawa family disappearing is a fact…
There's something strange about Ushio's death…)

(Anyway, not believing what my cute stepsister says…
What color is your blood, Shinpei Ajiro!!)

…Mio.
About what you just said…did you tell anyone?
…Nope.
Let's go ask Hiruko about the shadows.
Huh!?

That guy just now said it.
About the exorcism…so…
Yeah, thanks Shin-chan.
